MODULE: cosmos.integration.financial.memecoin_tracker
FILE: cosmos/integration/financial/memecoin_tracker.py (283 lines)
CATEGORY: integration

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Memecoin Tracker - Pump.fun & Bags.fm.

"Tracking the degens, one bonding curve at a time."

CLASSES:
- BagsClaimMode(Enum): Mode for fetching claim events.
- BagsTokenLaunch: Token launch configuration for Bags.fm.
- BagsFeeShareConfig: Fee share configuration - up to 100 fee claimers.
- BagsSwapParams: Parameters for swap transactions.
- MemecoinSkill
  Methods: def set_bags_api_key(self, api_key: str)
  Methods: async def get_pump_token(self, mint_address: str) -> Dict
  Methods: async def get_pump_new_tokens(self, limit: int=10) -> List[Dict]
  Methods: async def get_bags_token(self, token_address: str) -> Dict
  Methods: async def get_bags_trending(self) -> List[Dict]
  Methods: async def get_token_launch_creators(self, token_mint: str) -> Dict
  Methods: async def get_token_lifetime_fees(self, token_mint: str) -> Dict
  Methods: async def get_token_claim_events(self, token_mint: str, mode: BagsClaimMode=BagsClaimMode.OFFSET, of
